name: ModMe Frontend Collection
description: Frontend-focused agents and skills for next-forge — React 18/19, Next.js App Router, Tailwind, Storybook, accessibility, and UI/UX patterns.

items.usage: WCAG 2.2 AA audit — perceivable, operable, understandable, robust
UI/UX and system design review against best practices
React 18.3.1 and React 19 dependency compatibility matrix
Audit React codebase for anti-patterns using grep
Generate Playwright E2E tests for UI flows
Explore and audit a website with Playwright browser
High-quality frontend UI patterns and components
Capture UI screenshots for review and documentation
